title: PrivateLink connections from serverless compute to resources in your VPC through an NLB is generally available
body: You can now enable AWS PrivateLink to resources in your VPC (virtual private cloud) through an NLB (network load balancer) from serverless compute. See [Configure private connectivity to resources in your VPC](/aws/en/security/network/serverless-network-security/pl-to-internal-network).

ref_links.text: Configure private connectivity to resources in your VPC
